node.statement: (State polynomial optimisation — Klep-Magron-Volcic). The state polynomial framework generalises NPA to noncommutative polynomial optimization over state spaces: minimize φ(p) subject to φ(q_j) ≤ β_j for noncommutative polynomials p, q_j. The hierarchy produces SDP relaxations whose feasible sets are again constrained state spaces of finitely-generated *-algebras. Our theorem applies directly, bounding the commutant complexity of optimal solutions at each level. This extends the classical SDP rank-boundedness (which holds at each level of the Lasserre hierarchy for commutative polynomial optimization) to the noncommutative setting.
